For Doresian
I advise against investing more than e0 in him
He scales very badly with investments. But he's okay at e0 as a base

But I’m currently saving my limited pulls now
Yeap saw and just wanted to highlight it
Dont go beyond e1
Thank you, I won’t
so I really like doresian's str buffs, but it looks like g.helot is higher ranked in tier lists, who do yall recommend putting on a team with her?
I've heard thais is a nice pick
my units btw
I've been using g.murphy for almost every team lol, trying to get better caro and ultra comps and want to build around g.helot
I'm in astral reign ch 2 btw
Thais & Aigis are generally staples for her Team with another popular pick being Clementine
I've been sleepin on aigis <:dead:1356082627509092372>
You could also place Helot into the 4th Slot, but she'll only buff your Flails with Exalt as they're the only Command Card of hers that counts as a Strike
I could also see Faint working for GHelot, just as an Exalt Bot to infinitely scale Death Resistance
Leigh is also possible, as you'll be able to heal missing Health% via her Exalt but not keeping in check of her 0 Cost will make your Health become dangerously low
what about mixing realms? any benefit to g.helot by bringing in g.murph? I don't fully understand what makes g.helot so good
Xu can also work as well, you'll mainly be using her for the auto Embryo, Strength Down via 2-Cost and as an Exalt Bot to generate 3 Arithmatecia + apply Strength Down

Gimmick of E3 breaking Shield via Fetters and preventing them from further gaining Shield for another Turn on top of applying excessively copious amounts of Bleed, being able to generate lots of Strength while you are less than half of your maximum Health comes as a nice bonus too
Not sure about mixing Realms or GMurphy, mainly been parroting stugf that I had found out through listening to other people and looking at Game Info
gotcha, thanks for the help so far!
Yh np man
ghelot and aigis are like THE pair, also thais for obvious reasons. beyond those 2 horla, clem, helot, faint are all good options, xu, salvador, ramona, hameln, gdoll can also work but aren't as good
also the lone seed (ch7 posse) is by far ghelot's best posse and open up a much better play patterns for her

Finally, I can play gacha inside gacha xd oh, so low with standard Sigil wheels. Only Ogier and Tinct looks viable. Caecus and Agrippa looks like trash for him. 
Am I right he's only character who really want as much sigil as possible?

He does like sigil gain because his relic minigame is fueled by how many sigils you get. However, I don't think the sigil gain wods are very good in general. I run them but I don't feel good about them lol. He's a support and not a DPS so you can kind of just give him whatever the team needs. In arc 1 the brown wheels are fine.

His event wheel is kind of not great. It gives him crit rate (which helps his support skills, but gives bonus sigils on kill and getting ryker to kill anything in the endgame is an uphill battle.
Some units scale with sigil. Flares preferred playstyle is to buy relics so he has a ton of sigil gain. Varies from ppl to ppl playsttle

Yep  but I think rest of characters not bound that hard. Like "it's good to have  in sub wheel and sub stats". Ryker looks like " Run Feast from Afar and roll as much as possible ".
